title: Earthy Dense Brazilian Hind Shank Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Brazilian dish featuring hind shank, perfect for a date night, made with render fat and FODMAP friendly ingredients, cooked in a ceramic tagine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the hind shank with salt, black pepper, and smoked paprika.
Heat the render fat in the ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Sear the hind shank until browned on all sides, then set aside.
Add the dates, brown sugar, coconut milk, and brazilian seasoning to the tagine.
Return the hind shank to the tagine, covering it with the date and coconut milk mixture.
Cover the tagine and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the hind shank for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender and falling off the bone.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
